Crypto Payment Rails & Stablecoin Infrastructure

Find fiat on/off ramps, stablecoin APIs, cross-border settlement, merchant payment processing, card infrastructure and enterprise payment orchestration for digital asset workflows.

Explore ProvidersSubmit Requirements
29payment rail providers
6service-area groups
200+countries covered by leading rails

Service coverage

What payment rail providers help solve.

Use these groups to compare on/off ramps, stablecoin infrastructure, remittance networks, merchant commerce, cards and enterprise B2B payment systems.

01

Fiat On/Off Ramps

Convert fiat currency (USD, EUR, GBP) to crypto and back. Essential for onboarding traditional investors into tokenized assets.

8 providers
02

Stablecoin Infrastructure

Issue, manage, and settle with stablecoins (USDC, USDT, PYUSD). The payment layer connecting traditional finance to blockchain.

5 providers
03

Cross-Border & Remittance

Blockchain-powered international payments that settle in minutes instead of days, at a fraction of SWIFT costs.

5 providers
04

Merchant & Commerce

Accept crypto payments for goods and services with instant settlement and conversion to fiat.

4 providers
05

Banking & Card Infrastructure

Crypto-linked debit cards, banking-as-a-service, and card issuance platforms bridging crypto wallets to everyday spending.

4 providers
06

Enterprise & B2B Payments

Treasury management, payroll in crypto, vendor payments, and institutional settlement infrastructure.

4 providers

Provider directory

Compare crypto payment rails and stablecoin providers.

Search by company, payment type, geography, stablecoin support, merchant workflow or enterprise use case. Each profile is structured for fast shortlisting and AI-search clarity.

Showing 29 providers

AP

01 / Hybrid Fiat-Crypto Payment Gateway

Alchemy Pay

Best forMerchants and platforms in Asia wanting to accept both fiat and crypto payments through a single integration

Hybrid payment gateway supporting both fiat and crypto across 173 countries. If your platform serves Asian markets and needs a single integration that handles credit cards, local payment methods, and crypto payments together, Alchemy Pay bridges the gap.

173 Countries300+ MethodsHybrid GatewayAsia Strong
Provider intelligence

Alchemy Pay provides a hybrid payment solution that processes both traditional fiat payments and cryptocurrency in a single integration. Operating across 173 countries with support for 300+ payment methods, they are particularly strong in Asian markets where payment fragmentation (WeChat Pay, Alipay, GrabPay, local bank transfers) makes a unified gateway essential. For platforms tokenizing assets with Asian investor bases, Alchemy Pay handles the complexity of local payment rails while also supporting crypto on-ramps.

HQ
Singapore
Founded
2018
Provider type
Hybrid Fiat-Crypto Payment Gateway
Service areas
Fiat On/Off Ramps, Merchant & Commerce
Coverage
Asia, Global
Visit alchemypay.org
B

02 / Crypto Payment Processor & Card

BitPay

Best forBusinesses wanting to accept Bitcoin and crypto payments with guaranteed USD settlement and no price volatility risk

The original crypto payment processor, processing over $1B annually. If your business wants to accept crypto payments but settle in USD (no crypto volatility on your balance sheet), BitPay converts crypto to fiat instantly at the point of sale.

$1B+ VolumeSince 2011Instant FiatMastercard Card
Provider intelligence

BitPay has been processing crypto payments since 2011, making them the most established crypto payment processor. Their core value: businesses accept crypto, but BitPay instantly converts to fiat and deposits USD/EUR into the business bank account. The merchant never touches crypto. They also issue the BitPay Card (Mastercard) that lets consumers spend crypto anywhere Mastercard is accepted. For established businesses adding crypto payment acceptance without changing their treasury management, BitPay provides the zero-volatility bridge.

HQ
USA
Founded
2011
Provider type
Crypto Payment Processor & Card
Service areas
Merchant & Commerce, Banking & Card Infrastructure
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit bitpay.com
BS

03 / Stablecoin API Platform

Bridge (Stripe)

Best forDevelopers and fintechs needing stablecoin issuance, orchestration, and cross-border transfer APIs backed by Stripe

Stablecoin API platform acquired by Stripe for $1.1B. If you need developer-friendly APIs for stablecoin issuance, transfers, and orchestration with the backing and scale of Stripe, Bridge provides the infrastructure layer for programmable money.

Stripe-Backed$1.1B AcquisitionStablecoin APIsDeveloper Platform
Provider intelligence

Bridge was acquired by Stripe for $1.1B, signaling that the largest payment company in the world sees stablecoins as core infrastructure. Bridge provides APIs for stablecoin issuance (create your own branded stablecoin), orchestration (move between stablecoins and fiat), and cross-border transfers. For fintechs and platforms building stablecoin-native payment flows, Bridge provides the developer infrastructure with Stripe's scale, compliance, and reliability behind it. This is the stablecoin API that Stripe is integrating into its own products.

HQ
USA
Founded
2022
Provider type
Stablecoin API Platform
Service areas
Stablecoin Infrastructure, Cross-Border & Remittance
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit bridge.xyz
C

04 / USDC Issuer & Stablecoin Infrastructure

Circle

Best forAny institution, platform, or enterprise needing the most trusted, regulated stablecoin (USDC) for payments, settlement, or treasury

Issuer of USDC, the leading regulated stablecoin with $30B+ in circulation. If your tokenization project, payment platform, or treasury operation needs a stablecoin that regulators, banks, and institutions trust, USDC is the institutional default.

USDC Issuer$30B+Full ReservesInstitutional Default
Provider intelligence

Circle issues and manages USDC, the most widely trusted regulated stablecoin. With $30B+ in circulation, full reserves in US Treasuries and bank deposits, and regular attestations from major accounting firms, USDC is the stablecoin that institutional compliance teams approve. Circle also provides Circle Mint (institutional USDC minting/redemption), Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP for moving USDC across blockchains), and programmable wallet infrastructure. For any institutional use case involving stablecoins, USDC through Circle is the starting point.

HQ
USA
Founded
2013
Provider type
USDC Issuer & Stablecoin Infrastructure
Service areas
Stablecoin Infrastructure, Cross-Border & Remittance, Enterprise & B2B Payments
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit circle.com
CC

05 / Crypto Commerce Platform

Coinbase Commerce

Best forOnline businesses wanting simple crypto payment acceptance from the most trusted US crypto brand with no-code integration

Crypto payment acceptance from Coinbase. If your e-commerce business wants to accept crypto payments with the easiest possible integration (copy-paste a button) backed by the most recognized crypto brand in the US, Coinbase Commerce provides that simplicity.

Coinbase TrustNo-Code SetupE-CommerceSimple Integration
Provider intelligence

Coinbase Commerce lets any online business accept crypto payments with minimal integration effort. The advantage is brand trust: customers paying with crypto trust the Coinbase checkout experience. Integration is as simple as adding a payment button or using Shopify/WooCommerce plugins. For businesses where adding crypto payment acceptance needs to be a quick, low-risk experiment rather than a major infrastructure project, Coinbase Commerce provides the fastest path. Supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDC, and other major tokens.

HQ
USA
Founded
2018
Provider type
Crypto Commerce Platform
Service areas
Merchant & Commerce
Coverage

Visit commerce.coinbase.com
C

06 / Crypto-to-Fiat Banking Rails

Conduit

Best forCrypto companies needing reliable banking rails for converting between crypto and fiat without getting de-banked

Provides banking rails specifically designed for crypto companies. If your crypto or tokenization business has been de-banked or struggles to maintain fiat banking relationships, Conduit provides reliable crypto-to-fiat rails that do not get shut down.

Crypto-FriendlyBanking RailsDe-Bank ProofFiat Access
Provider intelligence

The biggest operational risk for crypto companies is not hacks or regulation. It is losing banking access. Traditional banks routinely close accounts of crypto businesses. Conduit solves this by providing banking infrastructure specifically built for crypto companies: fiat on/off ramps, payment processing, and banking services from partners who understand and accept crypto business models. For tokenization platforms that need reliable fiat banking without the constant risk of account closure, Conduit provides banking stability.

HQ
USA
Founded
2022
Provider type
Crypto-to-Fiat Banking Rails
Service areas
Fiat On/Off Ramps, Enterprise & B2B Payments
Coverage
USA
Visit conduit.financial
FP

07 / Enterprise Payment Orchestration

Fireblocks Payments

Best forEnterprises and payment companies needing to add crypto payment capabilities to existing payment infrastructure with institutional security

Payment orchestration layer from Fireblocks enabling enterprises to add crypto payments to existing infrastructure. If you are a payment company, PSP, or enterprise wanting to add stablecoin and crypto payment rails alongside your existing fiat infrastructure, Fireblocks provides the orchestration.

Enterprise Grade1,800+ ClientsPayment OrchestrationInstitutional
Provider intelligence

Fireblocks extends its 1,800+ institution custody platform into payments. Their payment orchestration lets payment companies, PSPs, and enterprises add crypto and stablecoin payment rails without building crypto infrastructure from scratch. The key advantage: Fireblocks already handles the custody, key management, and security. Adding payments on top means enterprises get institutional-grade crypto payments integrated with their existing payment workflows, compliance frameworks, and treasury operations.

I

08 / Web3-Native Card Issuance

Immersve

Best forDeFi protocols and Web3 platforms wanting to issue branded Mastercard debit cards that spend directly from on-chain wallets

Web3-native card issuance: Mastercard debit cards that spend directly from on-chain wallets and DeFi positions. If your protocol or platform wants to give users a physical or virtual card that draws from their on-chain balance, Immersve provides the Web3-to-Mastercard bridge.

Web3 CardsOn-Chain SpendingMastercardProtocol Branded
Provider intelligence

Immersve takes a Web3-native approach to card issuance. Instead of requiring users to off-ramp crypto to a bank account and then spend via a traditional card, Immersve cards draw directly from on-chain wallets. Users can spend their USDC, stablecoin yields, or DeFi positions anywhere Mastercard is accepted. For DeFi protocols wanting to give their users real-world spending power without forcing off-ramp friction, Immersve provides the on-chain-to-card infrastructure. Protocols can issue branded cards as a value-add for their users.

HQ
New Zealand
Founded
2021
Provider type
Web3-Native Card Issuance
Service areas
Banking & Card Infrastructure
Coverage
Global
Visit immersve.com
M

09 / Crypto Transfer & Aggregation API

Mesh

Best forFintechs needing to connect to every major crypto exchange and wallet through a single API for transfers, deposits, and portfolio data

Single API connecting to 300+ crypto exchanges and wallets for transfers, deposits, and portfolio aggregation. If your fintech needs to move crypto between any exchange/wallet combination or pull portfolio data across platforms, Mesh provides the unified connectivity layer.

300+ ExchangesSingle APIUniversalAggregation
Provider intelligence

Mesh solves the fragmentation problem in crypto: every exchange and wallet has a different API, different authentication, different transfer flows. Mesh provides a single API that connects to 300+ exchanges and wallets. Through one integration, fintechs can initiate transfers between any platforms, pull portfolio data across all user accounts, and enable deposits from any exchange. For platforms building crypto on-ramps, portfolio dashboards, or transfer functionality, Mesh eliminates the need to integrate with each exchange individually.

HQ
USA
Founded
2020
Provider type
Crypto Transfer & Aggregation API
Service areas
Fiat On/Off Ramps, Enterprise & B2B Payments
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit meshconnect.com
MI

10 / Institutional DeFi Access Wallet

MetaMask Institutional

Best forInstitutional investors and funds needing compliant DeFi access through the most widely used Web3 wallet with custody integration

Institutional version of MetaMask (the most used Web3 wallet, 30M+ users). If your fund or institution needs to access DeFi protocols with institutional compliance, reporting, and custody integration, MetaMask Institutional provides the compliant DeFi gateway.

Most Used Wallet30M+ UsersInstitutional DeFiCustody Linked
Provider intelligence

MetaMask is the default Web3 wallet with 30M+ monthly users. MetaMask Institutional extends this to funds and institutions by adding custody integration (connects to Fireblocks, BitGo, Qredo, and others), compliance reporting, transaction audit trails, and multi-user access controls. Institutions get the same DeFi access as retail MetaMask users but with the compliance and security layers institutional operations require. For funds that need to interact with DeFi protocols through a familiar interface with proper audit trails, MetaMask Institutional is the bridge.

HQ
USA
Founded
2020
Provider type
Institutional DeFi Access Wallet
Service areas
Enterprise & B2B Payments, Banking & Card Infrastructure
Coverage
Global
Visit institutional.metamask.io
M

11 / Legacy Remittance + Crypto Bridge

MoneyGram

Best forProjects needing crypto-to-cash and cash-to-crypto conversion through 350,000+ physical agent locations worldwide

Global remittance network with 350,000+ agent locations now bridging to crypto. If your tokenization project needs to reach unbanked or cash-dependent populations who cannot use bank wire or ACH, MoneyGram provides the physical cash-to-crypto bridge.

350K+ Agents200+ CountriesCash-to-CryptoLast Mile
Provider intelligence

MoneyGram operates 350,000+ physical agent locations in 200+ countries. Their crypto integration means users can walk into a MoneyGram location, hand over cash, and receive stablecoins in their digital wallet (and vice versa). This is critical for tokenized asset projects targeting emerging markets where banking penetration is low. While digital-only on-ramps serve banked populations, MoneyGram serves the billions of people who transact primarily in cash. For tokenization projects with inclusive access mandates, MoneyGram provides the last-mile physical distribution.

HQ
USA
Founded
1940
Provider type
Legacy Remittance + Crypto Bridge
Service areas
Cross-Border & Remittance, Fiat On/Off Ramps
Coverage
Global
Visit moneygram.com
M

12 / Consumer Crypto On-Ramp

MoonPay

Best forAny crypto platform, wallet, or dApp needing a white-label widget that lets users buy crypto with credit card, bank transfer, or Apple Pay

The most widely integrated consumer crypto on-ramp, embedded in 500+ platforms. If your wallet, dApp, or platform needs users to buy crypto without leaving your interface, MoonPay provides the embeddable widget that handles KYC, payment processing, and compliance.

500+ IntegrationsConsumer LeaderWhite-Label160 Countries
Provider intelligence

MoonPay is embedded in 500+ crypto platforms as the go-to consumer on-ramp. Their widget handles everything: KYC verification, payment processing (credit card, bank transfer, Apple Pay, Google Pay), compliance, and crypto delivery. The user never leaves your platform. For any crypto project where 'how do users get crypto to use our product' is a question, MoonPay is typically the answer. They support 100+ cryptocurrencies, 160+ countries, and provide the smoothest consumer checkout experience in crypto on-ramping.

USA
Founded
2019
Provider type
Consumer Crypto On-Ramp
Service areas

Coverage

M

13 / Stablecoin B2B Payments

Mural

Best forCompanies wanting to pay global contractors, vendors, and teams in stablecoins with automatic fiat conversion at the recipient end

Stablecoin-powered B2B payments for paying contractors, vendors, and teams globally. If your company pays international contractors and wants to use stablecoins to avoid wire fees and delays (while recipients still receive local fiat), Mural handles the conversion.

B2B StablecoinGlobal PayrollContractor PaymentsSame-Day
Provider intelligence

Mural targets a specific pain point: paying international contractors and vendors. Traditional wire transfers cost $25-50 per transaction, take 2-5 days, and have unpredictable FX rates. Mural uses stablecoins as the transfer rail: the sender pays in USDC, and the recipient receives local fiat currency in their bank account. The cost is a fraction of wire fees, settlement is same-day, and FX rates are transparent. For Web3 companies with distributed global teams (which is most of them), Mural replaces the expensive and slow international wire process.

HQ
USA
Founded
2022
Provider type
Stablecoin B2B Payments
Service areas
Enterprise & B2B Payments, Cross-Border & Remittance
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit muralpay.com
N

14 / Multi-Crypto Payment Gateway

NOWPayments

Best forBusinesses wanting to accept 200+ cryptocurrencies with automatic conversion and flexible integration (API, plugins, invoices)

Accept 200+ cryptocurrencies with automatic conversion to your preferred coin or fiat. If your business wants the broadest crypto payment acceptance (not just Bitcoin and Ethereum but altcoins, memecoins, and niche tokens), NOWPayments supports more assets than any other payment gateway.

200+ TokensAuto-ConvertMulti-PluginBroadest Acceptance
Provider intelligence

NOWPayments differentiates by supporting 200+ cryptocurrencies for payment acceptance, far more than competitors who typically support 10-20. They provide multiple integration options: API, e-commerce plugins (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento), invoicing, donation widgets, and point-of-sale. Automatic conversion means merchants receive their preferred stablecoin or fiat regardless of which crypto the customer pays with. For businesses in the crypto ecosystem where customers hold diverse token portfolios, NOWPayments ensures no payment is turned away due to token incompatibility.

Netherlands

2019

15 / Enterprise Payment Technology

Nuvei

Best forLarge merchants and platforms needing a full-stack payment processor that handles both traditional payments and crypto in one platform

Full-stack enterprise payment technology supporting both traditional and crypto payments. If you are a large merchant or platform that needs one payment processor for cards, APMs, and crypto (not three separate integrations), Nuvei provides the unified enterprise platform.

Public Company$200B+ VolumeFull-StackEnterprise
Provider intelligence

Nuvei is a publicly traded (NASDAQ) payment technology company processing $200B+ annually. They added crypto capabilities alongside their traditional payment processing, meaning large merchants can accept credit cards, alternative payment methods, and cryptocurrency through a single integration. For enterprise merchants where crypto is one payment option among many (not the only one), Nuvei avoids the need for a separate crypto payment integration. The platform also supports instant crypto settlements, payouts, and crypto-to-fiat conversion.

O

16 / Emerging Market Fiat On-Ramp

Onramp

Best forCrypto platforms needing fiat on/off ramps in India, Turkey, Brazil, and other emerging markets where global providers have limited coverage

Fiat on/off ramp focused on emerging markets including India, Turkey, Brazil, Nigeria, and Southeast Asia. If your platform has users in emerging markets where MoonPay or Ramp coverage is limited, Onramp provides the local payment method integration that global providers miss.

Emerging MarketsIndia + BrazilLocal PaymentsGap Filler
Provider intelligence

Global on-ramp providers (MoonPay, Transak, Ramp) are strong in the US and Europe but often have limited coverage in emerging markets. Onramp fills this gap by integrating local payment methods in India (UPI, IMPS), Turkey, Brazil (PIX), Nigeria, and Southeast Asian countries. For crypto platforms with significant emerging market user bases, Onramp provides the local fiat rails that enable users in these countries to buy and sell crypto using their preferred local payment methods.

HQ
India
Founded
2022
Provider type
Emerging Market Fiat On-Ramp
Service areas

Coverage
India, Brazil, Turkey, SE Asia
Visit onramp.money

17 / Consumer Payment Giant + Stablecoin

PayPal (PYUSD)

Best forAny platform or institution wanting stablecoin payments backed by the most trusted consumer payment brand with 400M+ users

PayPal's stablecoin (PYUSD) brings institutional credibility and 400M+ user reach to stablecoin payments. If your tokenization or payment project needs a stablecoin with consumer brand recognition that your users already trust, PYUSD provides the familiarity that USDC and USDT cannot match.

400M+ UsersPYUSD StablecoinPaxos BackedMainstream
Provider intelligence

PayPal launched PYUSD, a fully-backed stablecoin issued by Paxos Trust. The significance: PayPal has 400M+ active accounts. PYUSD is available within the PayPal and Venmo apps, meaning mainstream consumers can use stablecoins without knowing what a blockchain is. For tokenization projects targeting mainstream (non-crypto-native) investors, PYUSD provides a stablecoin payment option within an interface these investors already use and trust. The PayPal brand eliminates the adoption barrier that USDC and USDT face with mainstream users.

18 / Compliant Fiat On-Ramp SDK

Ramp

Best forCrypto platforms and wallets in Europe and UK needing a fully compliant, FCA-authorized on-ramp with strong local payment method support

FCA-authorized crypto on-ramp with deep European payment method coverage. If your platform serves European and UK users and needs an on-ramp with proper European regulatory authorization and support for SEPA, Faster Payments, iDEAL, and other European payment methods, Ramp provides the compliant European infrastructure.

FCA AuthorizedEurope LeaderSEPA NativeLow Fees
Provider intelligence

Ramp is FCA-authorized in the UK and provides crypto on-ramp services with deep European payment method integration: SEPA transfers, UK Faster Payments, iDEAL (Netherlands), Bancontact (Belgium), and others. While MoonPay and Transak are global, Ramp is particularly strong in Europe with lower fees and faster settlement on European payment rails. For crypto platforms with European user bases, Ramp's local authorization and payment method support typically deliver better conversion rates than global-first providers.

HQ
UK
Founded
2017
Provider type
Compliant Fiat On-Ramp SDK
Service areas
Fiat On/Off Ramps
Coverage
UK, EU, Global
Visit ramp.network
RP

19 / Enterprise Cross-Border Payment Network

Ripple Payments

Best forBanks and payment providers wanting to replace SWIFT with instant, low-cost cross-border settlement using blockchain

Enterprise blockchain payment network for banks and payment providers. If your bank or payment company wants to settle cross-border payments in seconds instead of days (replacing or supplementing SWIFT), Ripple provides the institutional-grade alternative that 100+ financial institutions use.

100+ BanksCross-Border LeaderSWIFT AlternativeSeconds
Provider intelligence

Ripple provides a blockchain-based payment network used by 100+ banks and financial institutions for cross-border settlement. Where SWIFT takes 2-5 days and multiple correspondent banks, Ripple settles in seconds with pre-funded liquidity pools. The network uses either direct settlement (RippleNet) or on-demand liquidity using XRP as a bridge asset. For banks and payment providers serving corridors with slow or expensive SWIFT settlement, Ripple provides the faster, cheaper alternative. This is institutional infrastructure, not consumer-facing.

HQ
USA
Founded
2012
Provider type
Enterprise Cross-Border Payment Network
Service areas
Cross-Border & Remittance, Enterprise & B2B Payments
Coverage
Global
Visit ripple.com
S

20 / Fraud Prevention & Compliance for Crypto

Sardine

Best forCrypto on-ramps, exchanges, and NFT platforms needing fraud prevention specifically designed for crypto transaction patterns

Fraud prevention and compliance platform built specifically for crypto. If your on-ramp, exchange, or NFT platform faces high chargeback rates, fraud losses, or compliance challenges that generic fraud tools cannot handle, Sardine provides crypto-native fraud intelligence.

Crypto Fraud ExpertBehavioral AIChargeback PreventionCompliance
Provider intelligence

Traditional fraud prevention (Stripe Radar, Sift) was built for e-commerce, not crypto. Crypto fraud patterns are different: wallet draining, bridge exploits, wash trading, mule wallets, identity farming. Sardine was built specifically for these crypto fraud patterns. They provide device intelligence, behavioral biometrics, and blockchain analytics to detect fraud before transactions are approved. For on-ramps and exchanges where fraud losses and chargebacks are the biggest threat to unit economics, Sardine's crypto-native fraud prevention directly improves profitability.

HQ
USA
Founded
2020
Provider type
Fraud Prevention & Compliance for Crypto
Service areas
Enterprise & B2B Payments, Fiat On/Off Ramps
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit sardine.ai
SP

21 / Solana-Native Payment Protocol

Solana Pay

Best forMerchants and platforms wanting instant, near-zero-fee payments on Solana with direct wallet-to-wallet settlement

Payment protocol on Solana with near-zero fees and instant finality. If your platform is built on Solana and wants payment acceptance that settles in 400ms for fractions of a penny, Solana Pay provides the native payment rail.

Instant SettlementNear-Zero FeesShopify PluginSolana Native
Provider intelligence

Solana Pay is an open payment protocol on Solana. Transactions settle in 400 milliseconds and cost fractions of a penny. Unlike card networks (2-3% fees, 2-day settlement) or even other blockchain payments (Ethereum gas fees), Solana Pay is essentially free and instant. Integrated with Shopify, merchants can accept USDC on Solana at checkout. For commerce platforms on Solana and merchants wanting the fastest, cheapest payment rail available, Solana Pay provides the infrastructure. The limitation: it is Solana-only.

HQ
USA
Founded
2022
Provider type
Solana-Native Payment Protocol
Service areas
Merchant & Commerce, Stablecoin Infrastructure
Coverage
Global
Visit solanapay.com
S

22 / Stablecoin Payment API

Sphere

Best forDevelopers and businesses wanting simple stablecoin payment acceptance with one-line integration and instant settlement

Simple stablecoin payment API: accept USDC and stablecoin payments with minimal code. If you want the simplest possible way to accept stablecoin payments (not build a complex crypto payment system), Sphere provides the Stripe-like developer experience for stablecoin commerce.

Stripe for StablecoinsSimple APIInstant SettlementDeveloper-First
Provider intelligence

Sphere provides the Stripe experience for stablecoin payments. Where Stripe made card payments simple for developers, Sphere makes stablecoin payments simple. A few lines of code and your platform accepts USDC with instant settlement, no chargebacks, and lower fees than card processing. For businesses already comfortable with Stripe's developer experience and wanting to add stablecoin payments alongside (or instead of) card payments, Sphere provides the familiar developer pattern applied to stablecoins.

SS

23 / Cross-Border Payment Blockchain

Stellar (SDF)

Best forFinancial institutions and fintechs wanting a purpose-built blockchain for cross-border payments, remittances, and financial inclusion

Purpose-built blockchain for cross-border payments and financial inclusion. If you are building payment or remittance infrastructure in emerging markets or cross-border corridors, Stellar provides the blockchain designed specifically for moving money (not general-purpose smart contracts).

Payment-Built5s FinalityCBDC ReadyInclusion Focus
Provider intelligence

Stellar is a blockchain designed from the ground up for payments, not general-purpose computing. Transaction fees are fractions of a penny, settlement is 5 seconds, and the network is optimized for issuing and transferring fiat-pegged stablecoins. Major deployments include USDC on Stellar (Circle's cross-border settlement layer), MoneyGram's on/off ramp integration, and multiple central bank digital currency (CBDC) pilots. For payment companies, remittance operators, and financial inclusion projects, Stellar provides the payment-optimized blockchain infrastructure.

HQ
USA
Founded
2014
Provider type
Cross-Border Payment Blockchain
Service areas
Cross-Border & Remittance, Stablecoin Infrastructure
Coverage
Global
Visit stellar.org
S

24 / RWA Payment Rails

STRIDE

Best forTokenization platforms needing payment infrastructure specifically designed for RWA transactions including subscription, redemption, and distribution

Payment rails built specifically for real-world asset tokenization. If your tokenization platform needs payment infrastructure that handles the unique flows of RWA transactions (investor subscription, token redemption, dividend distribution, NAV-based settlement), STRIDE provides the purpose-built RWA payment layer.

RWA Payment RailsPurpose-BuiltTokenizationDistributions
Provider intelligence

STRIDE addresses a gap that generic payment processors and crypto on-ramps do not fill: the specific payment flows of tokenized real-world assets. RWA transactions involve subscription payments (investors funding token purchases), redemptions (investors selling tokens back), dividend and yield distributions, NAV-based settlement (paying based on net asset value, not market price), and regulatory-compliant payment routing. Generic payment rails handle none of these RWA-specific flows. STRIDE provides the payment infrastructure layer purpose-built for the tokenization economy.

HQ
USA
Founded
2021
Provider type
RWA Payment Rails
Service areas
Enterprise & B2B Payments, Fiat On/Off Ramps
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit stridepay.com

25 / Developer Payment Platform + Crypto

Stripe Crypto

Best forAny online business or platform wanting to add crypto payments through the developer payment platform they already use and trust

Crypto payment capabilities from Stripe, the developer payment standard processing $1T+ annually. If you already use Stripe for payments and want to add crypto on-ramps, stablecoin payouts, or crypto payment acceptance, Stripe provides the integration within your existing payment stack.

$1T+ VolumeDeveloper DefaultBridge ($1.1B)Massive Base
Provider intelligence

Stripe processes $1T+ in annual volume and is the default payment platform for internet businesses. Their crypto capabilities include fiat-to-crypto on-ramps (embedded widget for users to buy crypto), crypto payouts (pay recipients in USDC), and the Bridge acquisition ($1.1B) for stablecoin infrastructure. For the millions of businesses already on Stripe, adding crypto payment capabilities is a configuration change, not a new integration. This is the most significant crypto payment development because it brings crypto to Stripe's massive existing merchant base.

Founded

26 / Global Fiat On-Ramp Aggregator

Transak

Best forCrypto platforms wanting a single on-ramp integration that covers 170+ countries with local payment methods and regulatory compliance in each

Fiat on-ramp covering 170+ countries with local payment method support and regulatory licenses. If your platform has global users and needs a single on-ramp that handles the regulatory complexity of 170+ jurisdictions (not just US and Europe), Transak provides the global coverage.

170+ CountriesMulti-Licensed75+ ChainsGlobal Coverage
Provider intelligence

Transak differentiates by regulatory breadth: licensed or authorized in 170+ countries with local payment method support in each. Where MoonPay and Ramp cover major markets well, Transak covers the long tail of countries where local regulatory authorization and local payment methods make the difference. They support 75+ blockchains, 100+ fiat currencies, and local payment methods including PIX (Brazil), UPI (India), SEPA (EU), Faster Payments (UK), and many more. For global platforms where every country matters, Transak provides the broadest single-integration coverage.

27 / Legacy Crypto Payment API

Wyre (Acquired)

Best forHistorical reference. Wyre provided crypto payment APIs before being acquired. Platforms previously using Wyre have migrated to MoonPay, Transak, or Ramp.

Legacy crypto payment API provider that was acquired. Wyre pioneered simple crypto payment APIs for platforms needing fiat-to-crypto conversion. Former Wyre customers have largely migrated to MoonPay, Transak, or Ramp for on-ramp services.

Legacy ProviderAcquiredMigratedHistorical
Provider intelligence

Wyre was one of the early crypto payment API providers, offering simple fiat-to-crypto conversion for platforms. After being acquired, most of their platform customers migrated to competing providers. Wyre is included here as a historical reference because many tokenization platforms originally built their fiat on-ramp on Wyre APIs and need to understand the migration landscape. The leading alternatives are MoonPay (broadest platform integration), Transak (broadest country coverage), and Ramp (strongest in Europe).

HQ
USA
Founded
2013
Provider type
Legacy Crypto Payment API
Service areas
Fiat On/Off Ramps
Coverage
USA
Visit sendwyre.com
WT

28 / Transparent FX & Cross-Border Transfer

Wise (TransferWise)

Best forCompanies and individuals needing transparent, low-cost international money transfers that integrate with crypto treasury operations

Transparent international money transfer with real exchange rates and low fees. If your crypto or tokenization company needs to move fiat internationally with transparent FX rates (not the hidden markups of traditional banks), Wise provides the honest fiat transfer layer.

Transparent FXMid-Market RatesAPIGlobal Transfers
Provider intelligence

Wise is not a crypto company. It is included because it solves a critical pain point for crypto and tokenization companies: moving fiat internationally. When a tokenization platform needs to distribute dividends to international investors, pay global contractors, or fund operations across countries, Wise provides transparent FX (mid-market rates, no markup) and low fees (0.3-0.5% vs 3-5% at banks). For the fiat side of tokenization operations, Wise is often the most cost-effective transfer solution. Their API enables automated international payouts.

HQ
UK
Founded
2011
Provider type
Transparent FX & Cross-Border Transfer
Service areas
Cross-Border & Remittance
Coverage
Global
Visit wise.com
ZH

29 / Crypto-as-a-Service Infrastructure

Zero Hash

Best forFintechs, neobanks, and platforms wanting to embed crypto buying, selling, and rewards into their existing products through APIs

Crypto-as-a-Service: embed crypto buying, selling, staking, and rewards into any platform through APIs. If you are a fintech, neobank, or platform wanting to add crypto features to your product (not build a crypto product), Zero Hash provides the white-label infrastructure.

CaaS LeaderWhite-LabelB2B2CEmbedded Crypto
Provider intelligence

Zero Hash provides the invisible crypto infrastructure behind platforms you already know. When a fintech app lets you buy Bitcoin, a rewards program offers crypto cashback, or a payroll platform enables crypto paychecks, Zero Hash is often the infrastructure provider behind the scenes. They handle everything: settlement, custody, regulatory compliance, and tax reporting. The platform never needs to interact with blockchain directly. For fintechs and platforms wanting 'crypto as a feature' rather than building a crypto product, Zero Hash provides the regulated, white-label infrastructure.

HQ
USA
Founded
2018
Provider type
Crypto-as-a-Service Infrastructure
Service areas
Fiat On/Off Ramps, Banking & Card Infrastructure, Enterprise & B2B Payments
Coverage
USA, Global
Visit zerohash.com

Selection framework

How to evaluate payment infrastructure.

01

Start with the user journey

Mainstream consumers need simple fiat ramps, institutions need compliant settlement, and merchants need reliable conversion and reconciliation.

02

Map geography and payment methods

Coverage varies by country, local banking method, cards, wires, mobile wallets, cash networks and regulatory licenses.

03

Choose the right stablecoin layer

USDC, PYUSD, USDT, branded stablecoins and settlement APIs each create different compliance, treasury and liquidity considerations.

04

Check fraud and operations

Chargebacks, sanctions checks, KYC, wallet screening, treasury controls, reconciliation and support quality matter once payments go live.

FAQ

Crypto payment rails questions.

What is the difference between a ramp and stablecoin payment rail?

A ramp converts fiat to crypto or crypto to fiat. A stablecoin payment rail moves digital dollars or other stablecoins between wallets, businesses, banks, merchants or users.

Do tokenization platforms need payment rails?

Most tokenization platforms need some mix of investor funding, subscriptions, redemptions, distributions, stablecoin settlement, fiat conversion and treasury operations.

Can FluidRWA help shortlist payment providers?

Yes. Submit your requirements and FluidRWA can help turn a broad payment infrastructure landscape into a focused provider path for your project.
